page_content:
Restriction: Must be in Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral) program.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.

HESP887 Academic Research Seminar (2 Credits)

This course has a focused, rotating set of topics each semester to cover professional and academic issues, including ethics, grantsmanship, professional presentations, professional publications, and peer review of journal articles.
